description: Third-party skill vendor directory. Contents are read-only upstream copies. Do NOT modify directly — use vendor-sync to update from marketplace.

impeccable.author: Paul Bakaus <paul@paulbakaus.com>
impeccable.description: Design vocabulary and skills for frontend development. 18 sub-commands + master skill with curated anti-patterns.

caveman.author: Julius Brussee
caveman.description: Global concise-Chinese output protocol (locally-modified fork). Injected via UserPromptSubmit hook, managed by /caveman-mode.
caveman.modification_summary: English caveman → concise-Chinese protocol; SessionStart → UserPromptSubmit hook; allowlist-driven skill bypass; drops wenyan/compress-CLI/statusline.
